title: cyclosorus sulfureus
intro: Cyclosorus sulfureus, also known as the Sulphur Buckler Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus sulfureus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Cyclosorus sulfureus is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used as a herbal supplement.
